title: Argentinian Sausage Skewers
description: Grilled Argentinian-style sausage skewers, perfect for a summer BBQ. This dish is inspired by the traditional street food of Argentina and is made with juicy sausages, bell peppers, onions, and a hint of smoky flavor.

ingredients.name: Argentinian sausages
ingredients.notes: look for chorizo or morcilla for authentic flavor

instructions: Thread sausages, bell peppers, and onions onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until sausages are cooked through and vegetables are tender.
Brush with chimichurri sauce during last minute of grilling.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
